CREATE TABLE test_data (value Float64, time UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY time;
SELECT time, value, exponentialTimeDecayedMax(10)(value, time) OVER (ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS exp_smooth FROM test_data;
SELECT time, value, round(exponentialTimeDecayedMax(5)(value, time) OVER (ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 3) AS exp_smooth FROM test_data WHERE value > 1.0;

SELECT time, value, exponentialTimeDecayedMax(2.5)(value, time) OVER (ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS exp_smooth FROM (SELECT value, time FROM test_data WHERE time % 2 = 0) AS even_values;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (key UInt32, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY key;
SELECT td.time, td.value, round(exponentialTimeDecayedMax(10)(td.value, td.time), 3) AS exp_smooth, ad.value AS additional_value FROM test_data td JOIN additional_data ad ON td.time = ad.key;
SELECT td.time, td.value, exponentialTimeDecayedMax(10)(td.value, td.time) AS exp_smooth FROM test_data td WHERE td.time > (SELECT AVG(time) FROM test_data);

SELECT (number % 10) AS time, round(exp_smooth, 3) FROM (SELECT number, exponentialTimeDecayedMax(7)(value, number) OVER (ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS exp_smooth FROM (SELECT number FROM numbers(100) WHERE number < 100) AS numbers_table JOIN test_data ON numbers_table.number = test_data.time);
SELECT time, value, cumulative_sum(exp_smooth) AS total_exp_smooth FROM (SELECT time, value, exponentialTimeDecayedMax(10)(value, time) AS exp_smooth FROM test_data) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time;
